recommendations.title: The Lair

recommendations.title: Shershaah
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the life of Captain Vikram Batra (PVC), the film celebrates his bravery, valiant spirit and honors his invaluable sacrifice during the Kargil War of 1999, at the age of 24.

recommendations.title: The Aviator's Wife
recommendations.overview: A student is devastated when he finds that his girlfriend is cheating on him. In order to find out why she did it, he decides to spy on her and her airline pilot lover. Then he sees the pilot with a blonde woman and he begins to follow them…

recommendations.title: San Andreas
recommendations.overview: In the aftermath of a massive earthquake in California, a rescue-chopper pilot makes a dangerous journey across the state in order to rescue his estranged daughter.

recommendations.title: Broken Arrow
recommendations.overview: When rogue stealth-fighter pilot Vic Deakins deliberately drops off the radar while on maneuvers, the Air Force ends up with two stolen nuclear warheads -- and Deakins's co-pilot, Riley Hale, is the military's only hope for getting them back. Travers

recommendations.title: Left Behind
recommendations.overview: After learning that millions have completely vanished, an airline pilot, a journalist, and others work together to unravel the mystery of those left behind.
